name: Kite Aegisub Scripts
description: Aegisub automation scripts maintained by Kiterow.

kite.AddTexture.author: Kiterow
kite.AddTexture.name: AddTexture
kite.AddTexture.description: Apply pasted ASS drawing textures clipped to selected text outlines

2.0.3: Aligned Execute/Cancel buttons and Kite Hotkeys registration.
2.0.4: Adjusted dialog field sizing and message dimensions for a more consistent Aegisub UI.

kite.ChronoSuite.author: Kiterow
kite.ChronoSuite.name: Chrono Suite
kite.ChronoSuite.description: Timing, cleanup, quality-control, and workflow suite for Aegisub.

1.0.5: Updated Auto Timing metadata and Kite Timing module dependency.
1.0.3: Added Cue Timer auto-search controls, Join Overlaps, and updated tool entries.
1.0.2: Renamed directional lead utilities, silenced directional snap success popups, and split gap audit presets.
1.0.1: Added directional lead-in and lead-out timing utilities.
1.0.6: Aligned Execute/Cancel buttons and Kite Hotkeys registration.
1.0.7: Repaired UTF-8 text in dialogs, labels, and multilingual help.

kite.Cliptomaniac.author: Kiterow
kite.Cliptomaniac.name: Cliptomaniac
kite.Cliptomaniac.description: Clip toolbox for measuring, transforming, reshaping, fitting, and projecting ASS clips.

0.2.23: Synced current Cliptomaniac release from autoload.
0.2.21: Updated rectangular clip fitting and canonical hotkey paths.
0.2.24: Aligned Execute/Cancel buttons and Kite Hotkeys registration.
0.2.25: Adjusted dialog field sizing and message dimensions for a more consistent Aegisub UI.

kite.FieldGroupManager.author: Kiterow
kite.FieldGroupManager.name: Field Group Manager
kite.FieldGroupManager.description: Group selected lines by field values and apply shared replacements.

1.0.4: Aligned Execute/Cancel buttons and Kite Hotkeys registration.

kite.GradientRow.author: Kiterow
kite.GradientRow.name: Gradient Row
kite.GradientRow.description: Create adaptive color gradients across selected lines and visible text from palettes or inline color states.

1.6.1: Centered the dialog and preserved saved palette colors.
1.6.2: Aligned Execute/Cancel buttons and Kite Hotkeys registration.
1.6.3: Adjusted dialog field sizing and message dimensions for a more consistent Aegisub UI.

kite.Mokashape.author: Kiterow
kite.Mokashape.name: Moka Shape
kite.Mokashape.description: Convert pasted Adobe After Effects mask data into ASS drawing lines.

0.1.2: Updated mask conversion and clip output handling.
0.1.3: Aligned Execute/Cancel buttons and Kite Hotkeys registration.
0.1.4: Adjusted dialog field sizing and message dimensions for a more consistent Aegisub UI.

kite.Obake.author: Kiterow
kite.Obake.name: Obake
kite.Obake.description: Build and maintain ASS transform and tag effects.

0.2.0: Synced current Obake release from autoload.
0.2.1: Aligned Execute/Cancel buttons and Kite Hotkeys registration.
0.2.2: Adjusted dialog field sizing and message dimensions for a more consistent Aegisub UI.

kite.PNG2ASS.author: Kiterow
kite.PNG2ASS.name: PNG2ASS
kite.PNG2ASS.description: Convert PNG images into ASS drawing lines

1.1.1: Added multi-image sequence conversion, white-matte detection, and frame-boundary timing.
1.1.2: Aligned Execute/Cancel buttons and Kite Hotkeys registration.
1.1.3: Adjusted dialog field sizing and message dimensions for a more consistent Aegisub UI.

1.0.6: Updated sign workflows and hotkey-visible actions.
1.0.1: Added dedicated hotkey paths and focused TagOps entries.
1.0.7: Aligned Execute/Cancel buttons and Kite Hotkeys registration.
1.0.8: Adjusted dialog field sizing and message dimensions for a more consistent Aegisub UI.

kite.Snapshoter.author: Kiterow
kite.Snapshoter.name: Snapshoter
kite.Snapshoter.description: Capture subtitle frames, frame lists, and clip crops from the loaded video.

1.5.0: Added current-frame timing, clip crop output modes, and frame-sequence subtitle outputs.
1.5.6: Updated to the current Snapshoter autoload release with expanded alpha output modes and FFmpeg config handling.
1.5.7: Aligned Execute/Cancel buttons and Kite Hotkeys registration.
1.5.8: Adjusted dialog field sizing and message dimensions for a more consistent Aegisub UI.

kite.Zheus.author: Kiterow
kite.Zheus.name: Zheus Colormanager
kite.Zheus.description: Gestor de color por actor, VSF y paletas accesibles

4.4.0: Added ColorRelay, dedicated hotkey paths, and compact accessibility controls.
4.2.0: Updated color-change workflow labels and main panel controls.
4.4.2: Aligned Execute/Cancel buttons and Kite Hotkeys registration.
4.4.3: Adjusted dialog field sizing and message dimensions for a more consistent Aegisub UI.
4.4.4: Repaired UTF-8 text in dialogs and generated reports.

kite.AutoBlur.author: Kiterow
kite.AutoBlur.name: Auto Blur
kite.AutoBlur.description: Match a sign's \\blur to frame sharpness with fixed or tracked sample points and time-varying blur curves.

2.0.0: Prepared Auto Blur for public DependencyControl registration.
2.0.1: Aligned Execute/Cancel buttons and Kite Hotkeys registration.
2.0.2: Adjusted dialog field sizing and message dimensions for a more consistent Aegisub UI.

kite.CopeOptimizer.author: Kiterow
kite.CopeOptimizer.name: Cope Optimizer
kite.CopeOptimizer.description: Optimize selected PNG2ASS color drawing lines by merging similar colors or reducing detected gradients.

1.0.1: Aligned Execute/Cancel buttons and Kite Hotkeys registration.
1.0.2: Adjusted dialog field sizing and message dimensions for a more consistent Aegisub UI.

kite.Wave2json.author: Kiterow
kite.Wave2json.name: Wave2json
kite.Wave2json.description: Export the active audio waveform to JSON.

1.1.0: Added whole-episode, selected-interval, and per-selected-line export modes.
1.1.1: Aligned Execute/Cancel buttons and Kite Hotkeys registration.
1.1.2: Adjusted dialog field sizing and message dimensions for a more consistent Aegisub UI.
1.2.0: Runs directly against the active audio and exports the full waveform without a dialog.

kite.AlectoKFX.author: Kiterow
kite.AlectoKFX.name: Alecto KFX
kite.AlectoKFX.description: Karaoke por silaba con fases Intro, Active y Outro configurables por lineas comentadas

kite.FadContinuity.author: Kiterow
kite.FadContinuity.name: Fad-Continuity
kite.FadContinuity.description: Remove internal fade edges between continuous selected timing groups

kite.InsertConete.author: Kiterow
kite.InsertConete.name: Insert Coñete
kite.InsertConete.description: Clone selected lines and replace visible text with Coñete

kite.Komari.author: Kiterow
kite.Komari.name: Komari
kite.Komari.description: Mark dialogue lines that contain stutter patterns

kite.LineMixer.author: Kiterow
kite.LineMixer.name: Line Mixer
kite.LineMixer.description: Shuffle text among selected dialogue lines

kite.Timing.author: Kiterow
kite.Timing.name: Kite Timing
kite.Timing.description: Voice-timing engines for waveform, multi-signal, and silence-based timing workflows.

1.0.1: Repaired UTF-8 method labels and progress text.
